title: Scope Analysis
description: Identify features, MVP boundaries, must-have vs nice-to-have, size estimates.
findings: MVP should focus on C++ level 5 classified catalog: source registry, official ingestion, canonical problem alignment, seed classification, catalog pages, and review queue.

title: Risk Analysis
description: Technical/project risks, unknowns, feasibility, risk levels, mitigations.
findings: Main risks are copyright/full-text storage, PDF extraction instability, source-label conflicts, and insufficient review workflow. Mitigate with metadata-first storage and evidence status.

title: Dependency Analysis
description: Feature dependencies, ordering constraints, parallel-safe groups, external deps.
findings: Critical path: source registry -> official ingestion -> parser -> canonical alignment -> classification -> catalog UI -> review workflow. UI depends on usable classified data.

title: Roadmap Assembly
description: Synthesize findings into roadmap.md: Milestone > Phase hierarchy, success criteria.
findings: Generated six-milestone progressive roadmap from source foundation through expansion.
